controls.name: sidebarToggle32Icon
controls.selector: button[aria-label="隐藏侧边栏"], button[aria-label="显示侧边栏"]
controls.expectation: 32px icon button uses rounded-sm, not full
controls.className: inline-flex min-w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-8 border-0 text-ui-md font-medium leading-ui-md shadow-none outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:bg-muted disabled:text-muted-foreground disabled:opacity-100 size-32 rounded-sm p-0 bg-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

controls.name: titlebarCreateMemory32Icon
controls.expectation: 32px icon button uses rounded-sm, not full
controls.className: inline-flex min-w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-8 border-0 text-ui-md font-medium leading-ui-md shadow-none outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:bg-muted disabled:text-muted-foreground disabled:opacity-100 size-32 rounded-sm p-0 bg-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm text-muted-foreground hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground

controls.name: carouselRight40Icon
controls.expectation: 40px carousel action uses rounded-md, not full
controls.className: inline-flex min-w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-8 border-0 text-ui-md font-medium leading-ui-md shadow-none outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:bg-muted disabled:text-muted-foreground disabled:opacity-100 size-40 p-0 !size-40 rounded-md bg-card text-foreground transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground

controls.name: memoryStudioPlay40Icon
controls.selector: button[aria-label^="播放片段"], button[aria-label^="暂停片段"]
controls.expectation: 40px playback action uses rounded-md, not full
controls.className: grid size-40 shrink-0 place-items-center rounded-md border-0 bg-card text-primary transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground disabled:bg-muted disabled:text-muted-foreground

controls.name: segmentAttachmentAdd32Icon
controls.expectation: 32px icon button uses rounded-sm, not full
controls.className: mb-2 inline-flex size-32 items-center justify-center rounded-sm text-muted-foreground transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background data-[state=open]:bg-secondary data-[state=open]:text-foreground

controls.name: speedDialRecording40MenuAction
controls.expectation: 40px speed dial menu action uses rounded-md, not full
controls.className: p-speeddial-action grid size-[var(--reo-speed-dial-action-size)] place-items-center !rounded-md border-0 outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background bg-card text-foreground hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground

controls.name: fabTrigger56Cta
controls.selector: button[aria-label="关闭表达入口"], button[aria-label="打开表达入口"]
controls.className: !size-[var(--reo-speed-dial-diameter)] !rounded-full !border-0 !bg-primary !text-primary-foreground !transition-colors !duration-200 !ease-out hover:!bg-primary focus-visible:!ring-2 focus-visible:!ring-ring focus-visible:!ring-offset-2 focus-visible:!ring-offset-background p-speeddial-button p-button-rounded p-button p-component p-button-icon-only
